query:
SELECT 
  ip.occupation, 
  ip.voiceTone, 
  ip.viewpointStatement,
  ip.personaExpertise,
  ip.personaEmotion,
  ip.personaViewpoint,
  ip.heroJourneyOrigin,
  ip.heroJourneyProcess,
  ip.heroJourneyHero,
  ip.heroJourneyMission,
  ip.identityTags,
  ip.contentMatrixAudiences,
  ip.contentMatrixThemes
FROM ip_profiles ip
JOIN users u ON ip.userId = u.id
WHERE u.openId = (SELECT openId FROM users WHERE id = (SELECT userId FROM ip_profiles ORDER BY updatedAt DESC LIMIT 1))
LIMIT 1;
